frictions.description: The --and-exit flag combined with --and-keys always renders the final app state AFTER drive_test_mode completes (including auto-ESC processing), which clears delete marks before the snapshot. This means intermediate marked states cannot be directly captured in stderr. Visual assertions (003, 004) verified via unit tests instead.
frictions.resolution: Used cargo unit tests (test_delete_mode_footer_uses_danger_background_and_mark_count, test_marked_entry_uses_trash_icon_and_danger_background) to verify rendering, and functional tests via script output to verify behavior.

summary: Tested 12 assertions: all 12 passed. Delete mode toggle (mark/unmark), multiple marks, script format, YES-only confirmation, ESC/Ctrl-C cancel, basename safety, PWD restoration, batch targeting, case-sensitivity, and cross-area navigation+delete all verified through functional script output testing and unit tests.
